context: reply confirming the round size and a board seat
draft:
Hi Sam,

*Round:* We're confirming the $4M at a $20M pre. *Board:* one seat for you, one independent to be named. *Timeline:* docs out this week, close targeted for month-end. I'd be glad to walk you through any of this on a call, no pressure at all.

sent: Sam - $4M at 20 pre, confirmed. One board seat for you, one independent (vacant, fills only with my sign-off). Docs out this week, close end of month. Anything feel off? Happy to talk it through.

context: follow-up after a demo, customer went quiet
draft: Hi Dana, just floating back up to the top of your inbox. There's a real, time-limited window here given our Q3 capacity, and I'd hate for you to miss the better pricing. Evidence beats another nudge, so: here's the ROI model again.
sent: Hi Dana! No rush on my account. When you're back to it, the one thing worth a look is slide 4 - it's the number your team flagged on the call. We re-ran it on your data; it held.
